items.title: High-dimensional tabular regression
items.description: When feature count is large relative to samples (marketing mix, genomics, sensor panels), Ridge or Lasso provide stable or sparse linear baselines before complex models.

items.title: Interpretable feature selection
items.description: Lasso's sparse coefficients identify a compact set of predictors for reporting, compliance, or downstream manual review in regulated domains.

items.title: Multicollinear predictors
items.description: Ridge handles correlated inputs in pricing, econometrics, and engineered feature sets without arbitrarily dropping variables.

items.title: Production ML baselines
items.description: Cross-validated Ridge/Lasso pipelines with standardized features are fast, reproducible benchmarks against gradient boosting and neural nets on structured data.
